description_long: A futuristic adult pedestrian is depicted wearing a form-fitting, high-collared bodysuit with armored segments and intricate detailing. The outfit features a dramatic asymmetrical long coat or cape that drapes from the waist, paired with thigh-high stockings and high-heeled shoes. The individual has a short, layered hairstyle with cat-like ear accessories and a visor or mask obscuring the eyes, giving a cyberpunk or sci-fi appearance. The arms are adorned with segmented armor and red accent lights, while the upper body is fitted with a harness and choker. The overall look is sleek, tactical, and stylish, blending elements of urban fashion with advanced technology. The character exudes confidence and readiness, suitable for a dynamic urban environment.
description: A futuristic adult in a sleek, armored bodysuit with a long asymmetrical coat, cat-ear accessories, and a visor mask, blending urban fashion with sci-fi elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long coat draping from the waist and the profile of the high-heeled shoes.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the armored bodysuit, harness, cat-ear accessories, and visor mask.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the segmented arm armor and the asymmetrical coat.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full length of the coat, back harness, and the hairstyle with cat-ear accessories.
attribute_clothing_type: futuristic armored bodysuit with asymmetrical long coat, segmented arm armor, harness, and choker
attribute_hairstyle: short layered bob with cat-ear accessories
